## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SquareCenterlineDashedHorizontal;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SquareCenterlineDashedHorizontal { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
reflect, mirror, alignment, dashed

## Categories
design, photography

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/square-centerline-dashed-horizontal)
